title: REINDEX causes "UNIQUE constraint failed" error when using TRIGGER
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT UNIQUE, amount REAL CHECK(amount >= 0));
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION tr1_function() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO t1(value) VALUES (NEW.value);
key_bug_features: REINDEX operation with recursive triggers causes UNIQUE constraint failure
